pages.title: Cover
content: Hero image: completed roof (same mood as site hero -- low angle, golden hour)

pages.title: The Opportunity
content: Current digital presence audit: what their site looks like now vs competitors
What homeowners see when they search their name or their service + city
Gap: trust signals they are missing (no review count visible, no license number, no before/after photos)
Cost of that gap in plain numbers: 'If you convert 1 more job per month from your site at $8k average ticket, that is $96k/year.'

pages.title: What You Get
content: Website preview (screenshot of the roofing template rendered with their branding)
14-section home page breakdown with what each section does for the homeowner
AI chatbot integration point (Voiceflow) -- what it handles
Delivery timeline: 5 business days from deposit

pages.title: Investment
content: One-time build fee: $1,000 to $2,000 (student sets based on market)
What is included: build, copywriting, one revision round, Vercel deploy
What is not included: hosting (client's Vercel account, free tier), domain, future content updates
Next step: 'Reply to this email or call {phone} to get started.'
